title: I Hit $1M ARR in 117 Days. Bootstrapped to $10M. Here's My Playbook | Chatbase, Yasser Elsaid
summary: Yasser Elsaid, founder of Chatbase, shares his bootstrapping strategy for reaching $10M ARR without external funding. The video covers lessons from hitting $1M ARR in 117 days, including product-led growth, SEO strategy, churn reduction, pricing experimentation, and decision-making frameworks for scaling from zero to ten million.
